S0_REMINDER.body: MOCASA: {name}, your PHP {amount} payment is due soon. Please pay on time to keep your account current.

S0_REMINDER_URGENT.body: MOCASA: {name}, your PHP {amount} payment is due tomorrow. Please pay today to keep your account current.

S0_DUE_TODAY.body: MOCASA: {name}, your PHP {amount} payment is due today. Please pay now to stay current.

S1_SMS_STANDARD.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, your account is {dpd} day(s) overdue. Please settle PHP {amount} promptly.

S2_SMS_STANDARD.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, {dpd} days overdue. See your personalized payment options for PHP {amount}.

S2_SMS_FIRM.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, {dpd} days overdue; your account may be reported as delinquent. See your options for PHP {amount}.

S3_SMS_STANDARD.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, {dpd} days overdue. Delay may limit your account and future loan eligibility. Please settle PHP {amount} or view your payment options.

S3_SMS_FIRM.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, {dpd} days overdue and may be recorded as delinquent. Please settle PHP {amount} or view your payment options.

S4_SMS_STANDARD.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, final notice. {dpd} days overdue and at risk of a delinquency record. Please resolve PHP {amount} using your payment options.

S4_SMS_FIRM.body: MOCASA Collections: {name}, severely overdue ({dpd} days) and may be recorded as delinquent. Please resolve PHP {amount} promptly.

S0_REMINDER.title: Payment due soon
S0_REMINDER.body: {name}, PHP {amount} is due soon. Tap to pay in the SKYPAYLOANS app.

S0_REMINDER_URGENT.title: Due tomorrow
S0_REMINDER_URGENT.body: {name}, PHP {amount} is due tomorrow. Tap to pay in the SKYPAYLOANS app.

S0_DUE_TODAY.title: Due today
S0_DUE_TODAY.body: {name}, PHP {amount} is due today. Tap to pay now.

S1_PUSH_STANDARD.title: Overdue: PHP {amount}
S1_PUSH_STANDARD.body: {name}, your payment is past due. Tap to settle in the app.

S2_PUSH_STANDARD.title: {dpd} days overdue
S2_PUSH_STANDARD.body: See your personalized payment options for PHP {amount}. Tap to view.

S3_PUSH_STANDARD.title: {dpd} days overdue
S3_PUSH_STANDARD.body: Delay may limit your account. View your options for PHP {amount}. Tap now.

S4_PUSH_STANDARD.title: Final notice: {dpd} days overdue
S4_PUSH_STANDARD.body: Resolve PHP {amount} now. View your options in the app.

S0_DUE_TODAY_EMAIL.subject: ⚠️ Action Required: Your Payment Is Due Today
S0_DUE_TODAY_EMAIL.preheader: Pay ₱{{amount_due}} today to avoid late fees and protect your credit record.

S1_EMAIL_OVERDUE_NOTICE.subject: Overdue: Payment Not Received—Late Fees Apply
S1_EMAIL_OVERDUE_NOTICE.preheader: {{overdue_days}} day overdue. Pay ₱{{amount_due}} today to avoid account escalation.

S2_EMAIL_ENTRY.subject: Notice: Account Escalated—Late Fees Accruing
S2_EMAIL_ENTRY.preheader: ₱{{amount_due}} · {{overdue_days}} days overdue. Pay now to stop further escalation.

S4_EMAIL_ENTRY.subject: Formal Collection Notice—Pay Full Balance Immediately
S4_EMAIL_ENTRY.preheader: Your account is now in formal collection. Pay ₱{{amount_due}} in full—no alternatives offered.

S4_EMAIL_PRE_CLOSE.subject: ⚠️ Final Notice: Account Scheduled for Final Review
S4_EMAIL_PRE_CLOSE.preheader: Before {{assignment_date}}, pay ₱{{amount_due}} in full. Unpaid files enter final delinquency status.

S1_EMAIL_STAGE_WARNING.subject: Action Required: Account Escalation Starts If Unpaid
S1_EMAIL_STAGE_WARNING.preheader: Pay ₱{{amount_due}} today or late fees increase and your account escalates.

S2_EMAIL_MID.subject: Follow-Up: Escalation Continues—Balance Unpaid
S2_EMAIL_MID.preheader: {{overdue_days}} days overdue. Additional late fees apply each day you remain unpaid.

S2_EMAIL_PRE_S3.subject: Warning: Legal Review Starts Soon
S2_EMAIL_PRE_S3.preheader: Without payment, expect intensified follow-up and escalation to legal review.

S3_EMAIL_ENTRY.subject: Urgent: Legal Review Initiated—Pay Immediately
S3_EMAIL_ENTRY.preheader: Credit reporting warning. Pay ₱{{amount_due}} before further action.

S3_EMAIL_MID.subject: Second Notice: Credit Reporting Under Review
S3_EMAIL_MID.preheader: {{overdue_days}} days overdue. Pay today to avoid bureau reporting.

S3_EMAIL_PRE_S4.subject: Final Warning Before Formal Collection
S3_EMAIL_PRE_S4.preheader: Credit bureau reporting imminent. Pay ₱{{amount_due}} now.

S4_EMAIL_FINAL_REMINDER.subject: Formal Collection Continues—Final Reminder to Pay
S4_EMAIL_FINAL_REMINDER.preheader: {{overdue_days}} days overdue. MOCASA formal collection is ongoing—pay full balance now.

S4_EMAIL_MID.subject: Serious Delinquency—Formal Collection Ongoing
S4_EMAIL_MID.preheader: {{overdue_days}} days overdue. MOCASA continues formal collection—pay full balance now.
